usage: add_shape [-help] -layer {layerNameOrPointer} [-net {string}] [-shape {None RING STRIPE FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE COREWIRE BLOCKWIRE FILLWIRE BLOCKAGEWIRE PADRING BLOCKRING DRCFILL FILLWIREOPC}] [-shield_net {netNameOrPointer}] [-status {ROUTED FIXED COVER SHIELD NOSHIELD}] [-user_class <className>] {-rect {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -patch {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -polygon {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...xn yn} | [-pathSeg {x1 y1 x2 y2} -width <value> [-beginExt <value> -endExt <value>]]}

options.name: -patch
options.description: Coordinates of the lower-left and upper-right points of the rectangle

options.name: -pathSeg
options.description: the beginning and ending coordinates for the path segment

options.name: -rect
options.description: Coordinates of the lower-left and upper-right points of the rectangle

options.name: -shape
options.description: {None RING STRIPE FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE COREWIRE BLOCKWIRE FILLWIRE BLOCKAGEWIRE PADRING BLOCKRING DRCFILL FILLWIREOPC} DEF Shape

options.name: -status
options.description: {ROUTED FIXED COVER SHIELD NOSHIELD} DEF status
